sprints.title: AgentForge v6.7.1 — Server Boot Duplicate-Registration Fixes

items.title: Fix chatRoutes double-registration in createServerV5()
items.description: chatRoutes was registered twice — once inside registerV5Routes() and once unconditionally at the end of createServerV5(). The unconditional call now guards on !options.adapter to prevent Fastify 'Method already declared' errors on startup. File: packages/server/src/server.ts. Commit: 00f2217.

items.title: Fix @fastify/websocket double-plugin registration
items.description: @fastify/websocket was registered twice — once in registerWsHandler() and once in registerWebSocketRoutes(). The second registration now guards with app.hasRequestDecorator('ws') to prevent the duplicate. File: packages/server/src/websocket/ws-server.ts. Commit: 00f2217.

successCriteria: Server starts cleanly with zero Fastify duplicate-registration errors
chatRoutes registered exactly once regardless of adapter option
348 autonomous tests pass (no test changes this release)
